scripts.docker:recreate: docker compose -f ./docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f ./docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.launcher:recreate: docker compose -f ./docker-compose-window.yml down && docker compose -f ./docker-compose-window.yml up -d --build
scripts.interception:keyboard-on: powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-Command', 'Set-ItemProperty -Path ''HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E96B-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}'' -Name UpperFilters -Value @(''keyboard'',''kbdclass''); Write-Host ''키보드 필터 설치 완료. 다시 시작 필요.''' -Verb RunAs -Wait"
scripts.interception:keyboard-off: powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-Command', 'Set-ItemProperty -Path ''HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E96B-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}'' -Name UpperFilters -Value @(''kbdclass''); Write-Host ''키보드 필터 제거 완료. 다시 시작 필요.''' -Verb RunAs -Wait"
scripts.interception:mouse-off: powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-Command', 'Set-ItemProperty -Path ''HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E96F-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}'' -Name UpperFilters -Value @(''mouclass''); Write-Host ''마우스 필터 제거 완료. 다시 시작 필요.''' -Verb RunAs -Wait"
scripts.interception:status: powershell -Command "Write-Host '키보드:'; reg query 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E96B-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}' /v UpperFilters; Write-Host '마우스:'; reg query 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E96F-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}' /v UpperFilters"
